cases.name: next-supabase
cases.purpose: Detect Next/React/Supabase signals and safe exclusions.

cases.name: unknown-stack-no-package-manager
cases.purpose: Keep discovery useful when no known framework or package manager exists.

cases.name: monorepo-workspaces
cases.purpose: Detect workspace roots and support scoped analysis.

cases.name: secrets-env-files
cases.purpose: Exclude .env files and redact accidental secret-like values before provider prompts.

cases.name: binaries
cases.purpose: Skip binary assets before sampling or provider prompt construction.

cases.name: large-repo-budget
cases.purpose: Respect max file and byte budgets in representative sampling.

cases.name: symlinks
cases.purpose: Avoid following symlinks during repository analysis.

cases.name: truncation
cases.purpose: Downgrade confirmed confidence when cited prompt evidence was truncated.

cases.name: invalid-provider-json
cases.purpose: Fail closed without writing files when provider output is not valid JSON.
